lebovitz.writer_profile: A renowned culinary expert and cookbook author, David Lebovitz shares his passion for food through his popular blog davidlebovitz.com. His recent food guide offers insider recommendations and culinary insights drawn from his extensive experience in professional kitchens and food culture.

morisse.writer_profile: Food writer for restos-sur-le-grill.fr, where Arnaud Morisse contributes restaurant coverage and dining insights. His recent work includes food guide content that helps readers navigate the culinary landscape.

pudlowski.writer_profile: Food critic and culinary journalist behind gillespudlowski.com, offering comprehensive restaurant guides and dining recommendations. Gilles Pudlowski provides expert food guidance through detailed reviews and culinary insights on his dedicated food website.

ellison.writer_profile: Food writer for Paris Update, an English-language publication covering dining and culture in Paris. Heidi Ellison recently contributed a comprehensive food guide, showcasing her expertise in navigating the city's culinary landscape for international readers.

restaurants.name: Chez Georges
restaurants.quote: Foie de veau à l'anglaise, rosé à cœur, tendre, magistral — institution gourmande parisienne où subsistent les traditions culinaires bourgeoises, les produits respectés, les cuissons maîtrisées.
restaurants.quote_en: Calf's liver à l'anglaise, pink at the heart, tender, masterly — a Paris gastronomic institution where bourgeois culinary traditions survive, ingredients respected, cooking mastered.

restaurants.name: Les Arlots
restaurants.quote: The sausage is succulent and delectable – it's not for nothing that the restaurant calls itself a 'bar à saucisse'. The other dessert was exceptional: a refreshing salad of Sicilian oranges with white-chocolate cream, light yet luscious.
dishes: tartare de Saint Jacques with bergamot sauce

restaurants.name: Baca'v
restaurants.quote: Very well-prepared French fare with seasonal menus featuring confit of paleron (short ribs), celery remoulade with foie gras, and classic French desserts.

restaurants.name: Breizh Cafe
restaurants.quote: Terrific crêpes and buckwheat galettes, right in the middle of the bustling Marais, using organic buckwheat and Bordier butter — buckwheat ice cream, too.

restaurants.name: Cafe les Deux Gares
restaurants.quote: Fresh oysters with Normandy cider vinegar, tuna with summer fruit, mackerel with spicy tomatillo sauce, and hazelnut crème brûlée — a great address near the Gare du Nord.
dishes: fresh oysters with Normandy cider vinegar

restaurants.name: Cafe de la Nouvelle Mairie
restaurants.quote: Very fresh, well-sourced food in authentic surroundings at reasonable prices — seafood always a good choice, and housemade sausages.

restaurants.name: Caluche
restaurants.quote: Remarkably fresh fare with raw, marinated sardines, a contemporary take on the Niçoise pissaladière (tart) with mackerel, and hake with braised endive.

restaurants.name: Chez Dumonet
restaurants.quote: Reliably good French bistro food with enormous portions — duck confit among the best in Paris, and a Grand Marnier dessert soufflé.

restaurants.name: Chez Paul
restaurants.quote: Well-made French food with a giant Côte de Boeuf (for 2) and dandelion salad with crisp bacon and a poached egg on top.
dishes: dandelion salad with crisp bacon and poached egg

restaurants.name: Comer
restaurants.quote: Fresh French ingredients in his contemporary Mexican fare, with crispy tostados with tuna crudo, peas and citrus, and outstanding homemade salsas.
dishes: tostadas with tuna crudo, peas and citrus

restaurants.name: Holybelly
restaurants.quote: Super-friendly café and restaurant using the freshest ingredients and locally-roasted coffee beans, with eggs and pancakes for breakfast and globally-inspired lunch.

restaurants.name: Le Rigmarole
restaurants.quote: When French ingredients get handled with a Japanese touch, the result is superb — pickled vegetables, butternut squash tempura, yakitori-style meats, oysters.

restaurants.name: Le Saint-Sébastien
restaurants.quote: Modern, carefully-crafted French cooking whose menu changes with the seasons — marinated turnips, duck with caramelized beets. The creativity of the kitchen shines through.

restaurants.name: Mantra
restaurants.quote: Une vraie cuisine de découverte ! Des saveurs puissantes, des plats très personnels issus de l'histoire du chef — mulet, poitrine de cochon, sang de betterave : cuisson parfaite.
restaurants.quote_en: A genuine cuisine of discovery — powerful flavours, highly personal dishes drawn from the chef's own history. Mullet, pork belly, beetroot blood: perfect cooking.
dishes: mulet with poitrine de cochon and sang de betterave
mousse au chocolat chaude et crumble cacao

restaurants.name: Ma! Le Bouillon chic italien
restaurants.quote: Le vin servi à la verse (San giovenese merlot) ressemblait plus à du jus de groseille qu'autre chose — mais on y mange et boit correctement.
restaurants.quote_en: The wine poured by the jug (San Giovese merlot) tasted more like blackcurrant juice than anything else — but you eat and drink decently here.

restaurants.name: Sornettes
restaurants.quote: De sympathiques petites choses maison dans les assiettes avec le soucis de bien faire — cuisson vraiment parfaite, belle mayo bien équilibrée. Mérite 20 minutes de trajet.
restaurants.quote_en: Charming little homemade plates with genuine care in the cooking — truly perfect execution, beautifully balanced mayo. Worth a 20-minute journey.
dishes: brioche bun with raclette, ham and hashbrown galette

restaurants.name: Cypsèle
restaurants.quote: Les arômes qui se développent en bouche sont dingues ! Ensuite on a du très bon, des plats pas mal, mais dans l'ensemble on se régale !
restaurants.quote_en: The aromas that develop on the palate are extraordinary! Then come some truly excellent dishes and others that are merely good — but overall, we had a feast!
dishes: wild duck bouillon with thyme, lemon and armagnac
sea bass with raw cream and chamomile oil

restaurants.name: Le Pinceau
restaurants.quote: Une viande de très grande qualité, en grande quantité, magnifiée par un jus sapide et gourmand — le menu du soir à 45€ représente un excellent rapport qualité-prix.
restaurants.quote_en: Top-quality meat in generous portions, lifted by a deeply savoury, indulgent jus — the €45 evening menu represents excellent value.
dishes: pork shoulder with miso jus and carrots
rice pudding with hazelnut and caramel

restaurants.name: Vingt vins d'art
restaurants.quote: Ce mix de saveurs franco-coréennes est magnifique et, comble du bonheur, le riz Oma est disponible à la carte, sans doute l'un des plats les plus réconfortants, profonds, jubilatoires que l'on peut trouver à Paris !
restaurants.quote_en: This blend of Franco-Korean flavours is magnificent and, joy of joys, the Oma rice is on the menu — perhaps the most comforting, profound, jubilant dish you can find in Paris!
dishes: œufs mollets au beurre de Gochujan et parmesan affiné
carpaccio de poulpe algues et concombre

restaurants.name: Les Petits Parisiens
restaurants.quote: La seiche travaillée avec trompettes de la mort et beurre blanc à la lavande se révèle mémorable en bouche !
restaurants.quote_en: The cuttlefish worked with horn-of-plenty mushrooms and lavender beurre blanc is unforgettable on the palate!
dishes: sashimi de sériole marinée au kombu, ponzu et ail noir
betterave en croûte de sel cacao et grenade
seiche au binchotan, trompettes de la mort, beurre blanc lavande

restaurants.name: Elysée Saint-Honoré
restaurants.quote: Du cabri à la carte ! Belle carte de vins corses, service agréable et efficace — mérite 30 minutes de trajet pour goûter au cabri.
restaurants.quote_en: Roast kid on the menu! Excellent Corsican wine list, pleasant and efficient service — worth a 30-minute journey for the roast kid.
dishes: desserts de la pâtisserie Carl Marletti

restaurants.name: Alan Geaam
restaurants.quote: Cette capacité rare à faire dialoguer identité et modernité sans jamais tomber dans le folklore — le Liban se réinvente avec érudition, délicatesse et une pointe de malice contemporaine.
restaurants.quote_en: That rare ability to make heritage and modernity speak to each other without ever slipping into folklore — Lebanon reinvented with erudition, delicacy and a touch of contemporary wit.
dishes: mini falafel with labneh and chickpea purée
langoustine chich-taouk with morels and peas
beef tartare with caviar and beetroot
kiwi meringue with Breton shortbread and dill

restaurants.name: Paolina Caffè
restaurants.quote: La beauté du comptoir, les cannoli, les bomboloni, les biscotto, le gâteau à la pistache et autres pâtisseries italiennes sont comme en Italie ou presque — foncez !
restaurants.quote_en: The beauty of the counter, the cannoli, bomboloni, biscotto, pistachio cake and other Italian pastries are just like in Italy — almost. Go!
dishes: paninetti with prosciutto di Parma and mozzarella

restaurants.name: Seoul Mama
restaurants.quote: Une cuisine fusion indo-coréenne pleine d'esprit, précise dans ses assaisonnements, délicatement épicée — jamais tapageuse, à des tarifs très sages.
restaurants.quote_en: A spirited Indo-Korean fusion cuisine, precise in its seasonings, delicately spiced — never brash, at very reasonable prices.
dishes: aubergine grillée with tofu cream and ssamjang
brownie au gochujang with black sesame ice cream

restaurants.name: Afendi
restaurants.quote: Le baba ganoush, ou moutabal, fumé comme il faut, dialogue parfaitement avec un taboulé vibrant de persil — des produits justes, des recettes familiales et un sens du partage qui rappelle les grandes tablées de Beyrouth.
restaurants.quote_en: The baba ganoush, properly smoked, pairs perfectly with a vibrant parsley-rich tabbouleh — honest ingredients, family recipes, and a spirit of sharing that recalls the great tables of Beirut.

restaurants.name: Casimir
restaurants.quote: Le pavé de veau basque avec sa sauce crémée au poivre est un monument du genre carnassier — vitello tonnato chef d'œuvre, sardines marinées splendides et si fraîches.
restaurants.quote_en: The Basque veal steak with creamy pepper sauce is a monument of carnivorous cooking — vitello tonnato a masterpiece, marinated sardines splendid and impossibly fresh.
dishes: pavé de veau basque with creamed pepper sauce

restaurants.name: Lava
restaurants.quote: Un plaisir en bouche, onctueux, gourmand, et tendre à la fois, grâce en particulier à la cuisson de la truite au feu de bois.
restaurants.quote_en: A pleasure in the mouth — creamy, indulgent, and tender at once, especially thanks to the wood-fire cooking of the trout.
dishes: betterave au feu with faisselle ice cream and ginger
truite des Pyrénées with red cabbage and sesame sabayon
gnocchis de pain torréfié with chestnut cream and Brussels sprouts
riz au lait with mango condiment and cucumber sorbet

restaurants.name: La Contre-Allée
restaurants.quote: Tout est savoureux, sans chichi, généreux, frappé au coin du bon sens et du bon goût — une adresse de confiance, pluma ibérique rôtie au beurre noisette avec ses nouilles sautées.
restaurants.quote_en: Everything is flavourful, unfussy, generous, stamped with good sense and good taste — a trusted address; roasted Iberian pluma in hazelnut butter with sautéed noodles.
dishes: pluma ibérique rôtie au beurre noisette avec nouilles sautées à la thaï
foie de veau poêlé avec pommes grenailles

restaurants.name: Le Petit Champerret
restaurants.quote: La mousse au chocolat très noire et croustillante joue la carte du grand classique réconfortant — une cuisine simple, juste et savoureuse, une maison d'amis.
restaurants.quote_en: The very dark, crisp chocolate mousse plays the comforting grand classic card — simple, honest and flavourful cooking, a home-from-home.
dishes: saucisse de Morteau avec lentilles en cocotte
poulet jaune des Landes with thyme jus and homemade frites

restaurants.name: Chez Fred
restaurants.quote: Une cuisine franche et fraîche qui fait chaud au cœur — tournedos Rossini, tête de veau gribiche, joue de bœuf à la bourguignonne, coquillettes truffées.
restaurants.quote_en: Frank, fresh cooking that warms the heart — tournedos Rossini, tête de veau with gribiche, beef cheeks à la bourguignonne, truffle coquillettes.
dishes: joue de bœuf à la bourguignonne

restaurants.name: Le Fouquet's
restaurants.quote: Le carpaccio de gambero rosso, d'une délicatesse presque sucrée, ou les ravioles de langoustines, nappées d'une sauce bisque — le grand Fouquet's retrouve son âme.
restaurants.quote_en: The gambero rosso carpaccio, almost sweet in its delicacy, or the langoustine ravioli draped in a bisque sauce — the grand Fouquet's reclaims its soul.
dishes: tarte fine au saumon mariné et œufs de saumon

restaurants.name: Argile
restaurants.quote: The roasted octopus was toothsomely tender, with bacony bits of guanciale and a rich cream of Parmesan sauce.
dishes: roasted octopus with guanciale and Parmesan cream
carpaccio of dorade with trout eggs
roasted duck breast with sweet and sour sauce and fried polenta
glazed roast pork with pointed cabbage and boutargue
millefeuille with orange blossom ice cream

restaurants.name: Monaco
restaurants.quote: Delectable thick lamb chops, served atop a pile of shredded carrots and celeriac with a sauce made with pistachios and anchoïade — seasonal French cooking at its best.
dishes: asparagus with mâche and lemon-aged Comté sauce
grilled zucchini with kiwi, wild garlic and flax seeds
lamb chops with shredded carrots, celeriac, pistachio and anchoïade sauce
chocolate ganache with coffee purée and yuzu candy

restaurants.name: Occasion
restaurants.quote: The first course of tiny, super-fresh raw scallops was beautifully accompanied by pine oil, fine carrot sticks and mandarin pepper-infused marmalade.
dishes: raw scallops with pine oil and mandarin pepper marmalade
pollack with broccolini and Swiss chard
restaurants.geo_matched_name: Marché du Livre ancien et d'occasion de Paris

restaurants.name: Atelier Mala
restaurants.quote: The dandan mian offered a warming, comforting dish bursting with wonderful flavors, combining wheat noodles with minced pork and sesame paste.
dishes: pork dumplings with ginger and Mala sauce
bok choy with garlic and ginger

restaurants.name: Candide
restaurants.quote: The financier made with the same Basque Grand Roux cornmeal as the polenta was astoundingly good – so, so buttery. Tender and flavorful pork shoulder with thinly sliced marinated zucchini with fresh mint.

restaurants.name: La Petite Périgourdine
restaurants.quote: The fabulous ris de veau (veal sweetbreads), crispy on the outside and luscious on the inside, served with morels and a fine gratin dauphinois.
dishes: ris de veau with morels and gratin dauphinois
Norman faux fillet steak with French fries

restaurants.name: 19 Saint Roch
restaurants.quote: The 'faux Black Forest cake' was a perfect, light version of a cake that is often over-the-top sweet, with light and luscious cream frosting and the chocolatey cake with a touch of alcohol.
dishes: bonito tataki with grape vinaigrette, shiso and peanuts
stone bass with lobster jus and mixed vegetables
venison with mloukhya sauce and puntarelle alla Romana
floating island with Béarn pepper and sesame praline

restaurants.name: Les Marmottes
restaurants.quote: The classic Swiss fondue, made with half Gruyère and half Appenzeller cheeses with wine and kirsch added for flavor — a tasty crust of cheese called the religieuse (nun) to be scraped up.
dishes: fondue (Gruyère and Appenzeller with wine and kirsch)

restaurants.name: À La Renaissance
restaurants.quote: The scallops were flash-cooked to the ideal state of succulence, while the tiny mushrooms added a touch of umami without overwhelming the delicate flavor.

restaurants.name: A La Biche au Bois
restaurants.quote: A gargantuan salade Perigordine, topped with a big chunk of foie gras, and other seasonal game dishes — not fancy but a lot of fun, and great food.

restaurants.name: Au Passage
restaurants.quote: Fresh, interesting small plates meant for sharing with a focus on quality ingredients and interesting salads combining cheeses, smoked fish, and crisp greens.
dishes: salads with cheeses and smoked fish

restaurants.name: Aux Bons Crus
restaurants.quote: Very respectable versions of French classics at modest prices — Steak frites with Béarnaise sauce, Tête de veau, stuffed cabbage, and endive salad.

restaurants.name: Bistrot des Tournelles
restaurants.quote: French standards like œufs mayo, steak-frites and a hearty daube de bœuf à la provençale, with natural wines featured throughout.
dishes: daube de bœuf à la provençale

restaurants.name: Chez Omar
restaurants.quote: North African couscous or a pretty fine steak-frites at an informal spot with a big mix of people that doesn't take reservations.

restaurants.name: Grande Brasserie
restaurants.quote: Excellent versions of reliable French fare with award-winning œuf mayonnaise with celery remoulade, fresh oysters, and roast lamb shoulder.
dishes: award-winning œuf mayonnaise with celery remoulade

restaurants.name: Kubri
restaurants.quote: A wonderful restaurant exploring the cuisine of Lebanon, by Franco-Lebanese cheffe Rita Higgins — labneh appetizer with broccolini, roast chicken with toum sauce.

restaurants.name: Le Bon Georges
restaurants.quote: The classic bistro has been updated with well-sourced meats and vegetables — steak tartare and steak frites in a now-popular neighborhood spot.

restaurants.name: Little Breizh
restaurants.quote: Great buckwheat galettes (crêpes) in a neighborhood where reasonable restaurants that use fresh ingredients are hard to come by — chocolate sauce and salted butter caramel.

restaurants.name: Oxymore
restaurants.quote: Pizzeria Française offering up pizzas with decidedly French toppings — the Pascaline with tomme cheese and piment d'Espelette, reasonably priced wine.
dishes: Pascaline pizza with tomme cheese and piment d'Espelette

restaurants.name: Recoin
restaurants.quote: Very delicious, gently inventive food — roast veal with root vegetables and mussels and fries with vadouvan.
